items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 25:1
items.html: Partzuf SAG of AK. This is so because it is forbidden to engage in the first two Partzufim Galgalta of AK and AB of AK. (Inner Light, Item 1)
